title: Madras HC refuses to direct NCLT to grant urgent hearing to Karti Chidambaram over freezing of bank account
description: The Madras High Court on Thursday refused to direct the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Chennai, to urgently hear a plea filed by Congress Member of Parliament (MP) Karti P Chidambaram seeking the defreezing of his salary account [Karti P Chidambaram Vs Union of India].A Division Bench of Justices SM Subramaniam and K Surender reasoned that constitutional courts should ordinarily refrain from fixing time-bound schedules for the disposal of cases pending before courts and tribunals, except
